text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to see Narita<n>Taishin and
Tamamo Cross talking<n>behind one of the school
buildings.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whatcha want? Why'd ya call me<n>out here
all of a sudden? I don't<n>remember havin' any
business with<n>ya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I wanna know what Creek's into.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What she's into? I can't really<n>thinka
anythin' in particular...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it now. You're tryna figure<n>out what to
get her. Y'know, I think<n>she'd be happy with
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... You're right, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's with ya? Jus' spit it out<n>already. You
have a special reason<n>why ya wanna get her a
gift?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Er... The thing is, I'm roommates with<n>Creek,
and, well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't remember my running<n>socks fitting
this nicely before...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they looked a little worn, and you<n>might hurt
yourself if they ripped, so I<n>mended them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, good luck with your training!<n>Do your
best!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I don't need people to remind me to<n>try hard...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you want? I've got stuff to<n>do.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I know you do. You're always<n>working so
hard with all your weight<n>lifting and stretching
and everything.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But you'll need energy to keep it up,<n>sooo...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! I made you a special meat<n>and rice bowl
that's both nutritious<n>and energizing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: This is a super important time forme too, and I want us both to keeptraining and working hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She's always doing stuff for me, and<n>I hate
always owing her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But I don't wanna give her anything<n>weird, so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, in that case, I don't got<n>any advice
for ya. Seems like you<n>already know what's
best to get her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If ya wanna pay her back for her<n>kindness, all ya
gotta do is return da<n>favor.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If you really don't get it, I guess I can<n>just lay
out the nitty-gritty for ya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...No, it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It'll be pointless if I don't figure it out<n>for myself.
That's how it is, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, now you're gettin' it! Ya jus'<n>gotta be
sincere about it, and you'll<n>figure it out in no time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Be sincere, huh...
Taaama? Where are youuu? It's<n>lunchtime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh! Tama, there you are! And Taishin<n>too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's on your mind? I can see<n>your little
eyebrows furrowing away!<n>Why don't you tell
me all about it<n>over lun—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No, I don't. I mean, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's no big deal or whatever. Anyway,<n>leave me
alone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh goodness... Now remember,<n>Taishin, you
mustn't push yourself<n>too hard!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is gonna be oneheckuva long struggle.
